Projects

Discover In Progress

A central catalog to find, explore, and understand available web assets and development tools across the enterprise.

chapeaux-catalog

Central catalog server for web asset discovery and metadata

In Progress HTML GitHub →

oxigraph-cloud

Distributed Oxigraph deployment with SHACL validation

In Progress Rust GitHub →

Deliver Coming Soon

Standardized delivery of web assets beyond the NodeJS/NPM ecosystem — allowing packaging, bundling, and a la carte consumption of assets.

chapeaux-delivery

Asset delivery server for multi-channel web asset distribution

Coming Soon TypeScript GitHub →

geoff

Semantic static site generator with RDF knowledge graph

Coming Soon Rust GitHub →

Tools & Infrastructure

Supporting tools, starter kits, and infrastructure for the Chapeaux ecosystem.

beret

MCP server that builds an in-memory RDF knowledge graph of codebases

Active Rust GitHub →

chapellerie

Playground for demos, testing, and experimentation

Active TypeScript GitHub →

chapka

Starter kit for open source participation in Chapeaux

Active GitHub →

cncpx

Cloud Native Developer Ephemera — containerized development tools

Active Shell GitHub →

cpx-scaffold

Shared build, serve, and test tooling for Chapeaux web components

Active TypeScript GitHub →

poire

Active TypeScript GitHub →

s20e

Serverless triplestore for distributed RDF data management
